name: domain-blocker-dns
description: A simple DNS server that blocks domains based on a list of blocked domains.
author: Miguel Tibincoski <contato@migtibincoski.is-a.dev>

scripts.postbuild: shx mkdir -p dist/schema && shx cp src/schema/settings.json dist/schema/settings.json && html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --minify-css true --minify-js true -o dist/block.html src/block.html
